test_cases.description: Standard banking intro — BVI company to HSBC Singapore
test_cases.pass_criteria: Complete draft — all fields filled, bank requirements included

test_cases.description: Bank not in guidelines — should use generic template
test_cases.pass_criteria: Falls back to generic template and flags it in output

test_cases.description: Historical success rate included when data exists
test_cases.pass_criteria: historical_success_rate is populated from mandate history

test_cases.description: Low success rate warning — should add recommendation note
test_cases.pass_criteria: Low success rate triggers alternative bank suggestion in output

test_cases.description: Client not found — should return error
Bank requirements summary must be present in output
test_cases.pass_criteria: bank_requirements_summary is populated from Semantic Memory
